name: AgentFinance - Weekly Performance Review

parameters.message:
=📊 *Weekly Trading Report*

*Week:* {{ $json.periodStart?.substring(0,10) }} → {{ $json.periodEnd?.substring(0,10) }}

*📈 Core Metrics*
• Total Trades: *{{ $json.summary.totalTrades }}*
• Win Rate: *{{ $json.summary.winRate }}%*
• Total P&L: *{{ $json.summary.totalPnl }} pips ({{ $json.summary.totalPnl >= 0 ? '+' : '' }}${{ (parseFloat($json.summary.totalPnl) * 10).toFixed(2) }})*
• Profit Factor: *{{ $json.summary.profitFactor }}*
• Sharpe Ratio: *{{ $json.summary.sharpeWeekly }}*
• Weekly Return: *{{ $json.summary.weeklyReturn }}%*

*🏆 Highlights*
• Best Trade: {{ $json.bestTrade?.symbol }} {{ $json.bestTrade?.direction }} +{{ $json.bestTrade?.pips }} pips
• Worst Trade: {{ $json.worstTrade?.symbol }} {{ $json.worstTrade?.direction }} {{ $json.worstTrade?.pips }} pips
• Top Strategy: {{ $json.bestStrategy?.name }} ({{ $json.bestStrategy?.pips >= 0 ? '+' : '' }}{{ $json.bestStrategy?.pips?.toFixed(0) }} pips)
• Best Session: {{ $json.bestSession?.name || 'N/A' }}
• Best Day: {{ $json.bestDay?.name || 'N/A' }}

*📋 Recommendations*
{{ $json.recommendations?.map((r,i) => `${i+1}. ${r}`).join('
') || 'None this week' }}

🕐 Generated: {{ $json.generatedAt }}

parameters.name: properties

parameters.message:
📊 *Weekly Trading Report*

No trades closed this week ({{ $json.periodStart?.substring(0,10) }} → {{ $json.periodEnd?.substring(0,10) }}).

💡 Consider reviewing setup quality and market conditions for the upcoming week.

description: Weekly performance review — calculates metrics, strategy/session/day breakdowns, generates recommendations, saves to Supabase and Notion
